2026-01-09.title: Learning Reconstructive Embeddings in Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Spaces via the Representer Theorem
2026-01-09.abstract: Motivated by the growing interest in representation learning approaches that uncover the latent structure of high-dimensional data, this work proposes new algorithms for reconstruction-based manifold learning within Reproducing-Kernel Hilbert Spaces (RKHS). Each observation is first reconstructed as a linear combination of the other samples in the RKHS, by optimizing a vector form of the Representer Theorem for their autorepresentation property. A separable operator-valued kernel extends the formulation to vector-valued data while retaining the simplicity of a single scalar similarity function. A subsequent kernel-alignment task projects the data into a lower-dimensional latent space whose Gram matrix aims to match the high-dimensional reconstruction kernel, thus transferring the auto-reconstruction geometry of the RKHS to the embedding. Therefore, the proposed algorithms represent an extended approach to the autorepresentation property, exhibited by many natural data, by using and adapting well-known results of Kernel Learning Theory. Numerical experiments on both simulated (concentric circles and swiss-roll) and real (cancer molecular activity and IoT network intrusions) datasets provide empirical evidence of the practical effectiveness of the proposed approach.

analysis.tldr: 利用再生核希尔伯特空间中的表示定理，提出基于重构的流形学习算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 高维数据中潜在结构的无监督学习需求日益增长，现有方法在捕捉非线性几何结构方面存在局限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用RKHS中的自表示性质，通过重构学习低维嵌入，同时保持数据的内在几何结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在RKHS中通过优化表示定理的向量形式得到自表示重构系数，然后通过核对齐将高维重构核匹配到低维Gram矩阵，从而得到嵌入。
contributions: 提出基于RKHS自表示性质的重构流形学习算法
引入可分离算子值核处理向量值数据，保持标量相似函数的简洁性
通过核对齐将RKHS的重构几何迁移到低维嵌入空间
analysis.experiments: 在模拟数据集（同心圆、瑞士卷）和真实数据集（癌症分子活性、物联网网络入侵）上进行了数值实验，验证了方法的有效性。
limitations: 可能对核函数选择敏感
大规模数据上的计算效率可能受限
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用再生核希尔伯特空间中的表示定理，提出基于重构的流形学习算法。
